B. Proposed System

rate To address the fragmentation of existing business and

team collaboration come together.

• A chatbot that uses retrieval-augmented generation
(RAG) and organizational data sources to provide rele- •
vant, intelligent responses to user queries.
BizCollab was implemented using a modern web-based
architecture. The frontend was developed with Next.js/React
to support interactivity, while Supabase was employed for
backend data management and JWT for authentication and
identity. AI capabilities are integrated via Langchain, RAG
pipelines and FastAPI for smooth operation with LLM APIs
like Llama and Grok.
With this stack, BizCollab aims to reduce reliance on many
disparate platforms and improve overall speed of operations
as well as the transfer knowledge between teams. AI-enabled •
components such as Mindflow and the context-driven chatbot
distinguish BizCollab from existing systems. These modules
were designed to support productivity and provide decision-
support functionalities by structuring organizational data and
meeting content.

III. RESULTSANDDISCUSSION
som
This section evaluates the effectiveness of BizCollab in inve
improving business and collaboration efficiency compared to curr
commonly used fragmented toolchains (e.g., Google Sheets, tuni
WhatsApp, and standalone invoicing software).
D.
A. Study Design
T
To examine BizCollab’s impact on task efficiency and desi
knowledge retention, a controlled within-subjects experiment ital
was conducted with 10 participants. Each participant com-
pleted four sets of tasks under two conditions:
1) Baseline condition — Using existing, fragmented tools;
2) BizCollab condition — Using the unified prototype
platform.
The following hypotheses were tested:
• H1: BizCollab reduces tool-switching frequency and op-
erational time compared to fragmented workflows.
• H2: BizCollab enhances knowledge capture and retrieval
efficiency via its AI-driven modules.
• H3: BizCollab improves perceived task fluidity and re-
duces cognitive overhead.
Tasks included invoice generation, expense logging, collab-
orative decision-making, and meeting summarization using
the Mindflow feature. Task completion time, number of tools
used,knowledgecaptureaccuracy,andchatbotprecisionwere
recorded.
